description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5 Docker image and a redis:latest service, caches the vendor/ruby directory, and defines a REDIS_URL variable pointing to redis://redis:6379/. Add an integration job in the default test stage that first runs the before_script commands ruby -v, gem install bundler --no-document, and bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, then executes ./vendor/bin/install_phantomjs.sh followed by ./bin/ci. The job has no artifacts, no special rules, and runs on every pipeline.
